name: Claim denied because no witnesses to my chemical exposure in Taylorsville?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied because no witnesses to my chemical exposure in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.description: Witnesses help but not required; medical records and job logs suffice for causation.[9] Utah ODA relies on objective evidence over testimony.[1] Key factors: exposure documentation, doctor reports, safety data. Appeal with alternatives like manifests or co-worker statements later. Denials overturned routinely.
